title: Reheating after Starobinsky Inflation in the Jordan Frame
summary: We investigate gravitational reheating in the Starobinsky model in the Jordan frame, where inflation is driven by an $R^2$ modification of gravity with no explicit inflaton field. In this description, reheating proceeds exclusively through gravitational particle production triggered by the oscillations of the Ricci scalar after the end of inflation. We analyze the post-inflationary background evolution and show that an effective fluid emerging from the modified gravitational dynamics behaves as pressureless matter during the oscillatory phase. Including the backreaction of the produced particles, we demonstrate that the Ricci scalar oscillations acquire an exponential damping, consistently terminating particle production. Solving the coupled background and Boltzmann equations, we obtain a reheating temperature $T_{\mathrm{reh}} \sim 2 \times 10^{9}$ GeV. We finally compare the Jordan and Einstein frame descriptions and argue that, although classically equivalent, they can lead to distinct microphysical interpretations and quantitative predictions for reheating once quantum effects are taken into account.

AI.tldr: 研究Starobinsky模型中引力再加热过程，在Jordan框架下通过Ricci标量振荡产生粒子，得到再加热温度约2×10^9 GeV，并比较Jordan和Einstein框架的量子效应差异。
AI.motivation: 研究Starobinsky模型在Jordan框架下的引力再加热机制，该模型通过R²修正驱动暴胀而没有显式暴胀子场，需要理解纯引力机制如何实现再加热过程。
AI.method: 在Jordan框架下分析暴胀后背景演化，将修正引力动力学产生的有效流体视为无压物质，考虑产生粒子的反作用，求解耦合的背景方程和Boltzmann方程。
AI.result: Ricci标量振荡产生指数阻尼效应，一致地终止粒子产生，计算得到再加热温度T_reh ∼ 2×10^9 GeV，发现Jordan和Einstein框架在量子效应下有不同的微观解释和定量预测。
AI.conclusion: Starobinsky模型在Jordan框架下可通过纯引力机制实现再加热，Ricci标量振荡产生粒子并自洽终止，量子效应使经典等价的Jordan和Einstein框架产生不同的物理解释和预测。

title: Nonlinear Dynamics in General Relativity
summary: Black holes and gravitational waves are consequences of the nonlinear character of the Einstein equations. Yet, the remarkable properties of General Relativity point to the existence of other effects. Here we uncover new nonlinear facets of gravity. We establish higher harmonic generation, spectral broadening and focusing in the Einstein Klein-Gordon system. In vacuum, we show that scattering of monochromatic waves at quadratic order is weakly sensitive to frequency, at large wavelengths. These aspects can both explain the seemingly smooth behavior of mergers, but also caution us against too simplistic an interpretation of waveforms.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了引力中的新非线性效应，包括高次谐波生成、频谱展宽和聚焦现象，这些效应有助于解释黑洞合并的平滑行为，但也警告我们对引力波波形的解释不能过于简单化。
AI.motivation: 黑洞和引力波是爱因斯坦方程非线性特性的结果，但广义相对论的显著性质表明还存在其他效应。本文旨在揭示引力中的新非线性方面，这些效应可以解释黑洞合并看似平滑的行为，同时提醒我们不要过于简单化地解释引力波波形。
AI.method: 研究爱因斯坦-克莱因-戈登系统中的非线性效应，包括高次谐波生成、频谱展宽和聚焦现象。在真空中，研究单色波在二次阶的散射特性，特别关注大波长情况下的频率敏感性。
AI.result: 发现了引力中的新非线性效应：高次谐波生成、频谱展宽和聚焦。在真空中，单色波在二次阶的散射对大波长情况下的频率变化不敏感。这些效应可以解释黑洞合并的平滑行为。
AI.conclusion: 引力中存在先前未被充分认识的非线性效应，这些效应既有助于解释黑洞合并观测到的平滑行为，也警告物理学家在解释引力波波形时需要更加谨慎，不能过于简单化。

title: Aspects of Relativity in Flat Spacetime
comment: Lecture notes; 80 pages; some material used from arXiv:1901.08058
summary: A monograph on the mathematical aspects of Special Relativity, focusing on the Lorentz group and the properties of relativistic transformations in mechanics and electrodynamics. Manuscript of published book, with an added appendix.

AI.tldr: 关于狭义相对论数学方面的专著，重点研究洛伦兹群以及在力学和电动力学中的相对论变换性质
AI.motivation: 系统阐述狭义相对论的数学基础，特别是洛伦兹群的结构和性质，为理解相对论力学和电动力学提供严格的数学框架
AI.method: 采用数学专著的形式，从群论角度分析洛伦兹变换，结合力学和电动力学的具体应用，并包含附录补充内容
AI.result: 形成了一本完整的数学专著，系统建立了狭义相对论的数学理论体系，包括洛伦兹群的结构分析和相对论变换在物理中的应用
AI.conclusion: 洛伦兹群是理解狭义相对论的核心数学结构，其性质深刻影响着相对论力学和电动力学的理论框架，数学分析为物理理论提供了坚实基础

title: Cosmological black holes in the inflationary epoch
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, for publication in Journal of Cosmology and Astroparticle Physics
summary: We investigate the evolution of black holes present during the inflationary epoch, assuming they are dynamically coupled to the cosmological background through a generalized McVittie geometry, such that their gravitational mass scales with the cosmic scale factor. Adopting Starobinsky's $\mathcal{R}^2$ inflation model, we analyse the combined effects of cosmological coupling, Hawking evaporation and radiation accretion during the subsequent cosmic eras: inflation, radiation, matter, and dark energy. Requiring the black hole event horizon to remain smaller than the particle horizon at all times yields an upper bound on the mass parameter. Radiation accretion during the radiation era further constrains the parameter space to prevent runaway growth. Hawking evaporation sets a lower bound on the initial mass to ensure survival through inflation. We find that only black holes formed within a narrow initial mass range during inflation can persist to the present day, reaching a maximum mass of $M(t_0) \simeq 1.043\times10^{-3} M_\odot$.

AI.tldr: 研究宇宙膨胀时期黑洞的演化，考虑广义McVittie几何中黑洞质量随宇宙尺度因子变化，结合霍金蒸发和辐射吸积，发现只有特定初始质量范围的黑洞能存活至今。
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙膨胀时期形成的黑洞在后续宇宙演化中的命运，考虑黑洞与宇宙背景的动态耦合、霍金蒸发和辐射吸积的综合效应。
AI.method: 采用广义McVittie几何描述黑洞与宇宙背景的耦合，使用Starobinsky的R²膨胀模型，分析膨胀、辐射、物质和暗能量四个时期的黑洞演化过程。
AI.result: 黑洞视界必须始终小于粒子视界，这给出了质量参数的上限；辐射时期的辐射吸积进一步限制了参数空间；霍金蒸发设定了初始质量的下限以确保黑洞能存活过膨胀期。只有初始质量在狭窄范围内的黑洞能存活至今，最大质量约为1.043×10⁻³太阳质量。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙膨胀时期形成的黑洞只有在特定初始质量范围内才能存活到当前宇宙时期，这些黑洞的最终质量受到多重物理过程的严格约束。

title: Experiments towards a neutron target for measurements in inverse kinematics
summary: Neutron-induced reactions play an important role in fundamental nuclear physics, nuclear astrophysics, and applications. In the case of reactions on rare isotopes, there are limited options for direct experimental measurements. The Neutron Target Demonstrator project at Los Alamos National Laboratory seeks to test the feasibility of moderating spallation neutrons within a 1~m$^3$ graphite cube to create a standing neutron target for neutron-induced reaction measurements in inverse kinematics. This paper presents the results of experimental neutron flux distribution tests using neutron sources (ranging from 1~keV to 50~MeV) created by accelerators at the University of Notre Dame and Texas A\&M University. Measurements were made with both the full graphite cube as well as a ''half cube'' setup in which half of the graphite cube was removed. The measured distributions agree with simulated distributions in the case of the full cube moderator, although there remain discrepancies in certain cases for the half cube moderator. The results shown here will provide useful information for an upcoming experimental campaign to test the neutron target proof-of-principle.

AI.tldr: 测试1立方米石墨立方体作为中子靶的可行性，通过实验测量中子通量分布并与模拟结果比较
AI.motivation: 中子诱导反应在核物理、核天体物理和应用中很重要，但对于稀有同位素，直接实验测量选项有限。需要开发新的测量方法。
AI.method: 使用洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室的中子靶演示项目，在1立方米石墨立方体中调制散裂中子，创建用于逆运动学测量的中子靶。使用圣母大学和德州农工大学的加速器产生1 keV到50 MeV的中子源，测量全立方体和半立方体设置下的中子通量分布。
AI.result: 全立方体调制器的测量分布与模拟分布一致，但半立方体调制器在某些情况下仍存在差异。这些结果为即将进行的原理验证实验提供了有用信息。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果支持了使用石墨立方体作为中子靶的可行性，为未来的中子诱导反应测量实验奠定了基础。

title: Parameter estimation of eccentric massive black hole binaries with LISA and its cosmological implications
summary: Future space-based gravitational wave (GW) observatories such as LISA will detect massive black hole binaries (MBHBs), which are expected to be accompanied by electromagnetic counterparts, thereby providing bright standard sirens for cosmology. The orbital eccentricity of MBHBs can significantly improve the parameter estimation of GWs because the multiple harmonics induced by eccentricity provide additional information and help break down the degeneracies among waveform parameters. In this paper, we use the EccentricFD waveform and construct 5-year GW event catalogs for LISA under three population models (popIII, Q3d and Q3nod). For the three models, we find that an initial eccentricity of $e_0=0.4$ at $10^{-4}$ Hz yields improvements in sky localization and distance inference by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(10)$ in the best cases. As a consequence, the average number of bright sirens increases substantially: from 8 to 11 (PopIII), 6 to 12 (Q3d) and 13 to 24 (Q3nod). This increase in event number, together with enhanced localization and distance inference, leads to tighter cosmological constraints. In the $Λ$CDM model, for instance, the relative uncertainty on $H_0$ is reduced from $8.17\%$ to $4.35\%$ for the Q3d model, corresponding to an improvement of approximately $47\%$. We also investigate the improvement in constraints on the dark energy equation of state and modified GW propagation when combining bright sirens with the latest cosmic microwave background data. These results demonstrate that eccentricity is a remarkably significant feature in GW detection and parameter estimation, enabling more accurate measurements of the Universe with future space-based observatories.

AI.tldr: 轨道偏心率显著提升LISA对超大质量黑洞双星的参数估计，改善定位和距离测量，增加明亮标准汽笛数量，从而增强宇宙学约束
AI.motivation: 未来空间引力波观测站如LISA将探测超大质量黑洞双星，这些系统通常伴随电磁对应体，可作为明亮标准汽笛用于宇宙学研究。轨道偏心率能提供额外谐波信息，打破波形参数间的简并性，从而改善参数估计
AI.method: 使用EccentricFD波形，在三种种群模型(popIII, Q3d, Q3nod)下构建LISA的5年引力波事件目录，分析初始偏心率e₀=0.4在10⁻⁴Hz频率下的影响
AI.result: 偏心率使天空定位和距离推断改善约10倍，明亮汽笛数量显著增加：popIII从8到11，Q3d从6到12，Q3nod从13到24。在ΛCDM模型中，H₀的相对不确定度从8.17%降至4.35%，改善约47%。对暗能量状态方程和修正引力波传播的约束也有改善
AI.conclusion: 轨道偏心率是引力波探测和参数估计中极其重要的特征，能使未来空间观测站更精确地测量宇宙学参数，结合宇宙微波背景数据可进一步增强对暗能量和引力波传播的约束

title: Modular memristor model with synaptic-like plasticity and volatile memory
summary:
Compact models of memristors are essential for simulating large-scale neuromorphic systems, yet they often do not include description of complex dynamics like volatile relaxation and synaptic plasticity. We introduce a modular, computationally efficient memristor model that bridges this gap by integrating principles from physics and computational neuroscience. The model defines a framework consisting of a standard formulation of memristive device dynamics, a functional rule mapping state variables to cumulative conductance, a volatility module inspired by the theory of linear viscoelasticity and a saturation module implementing a linear-nonlinear technique. Additionally, we develop a formulation of synaptic-like plasticity inspired by a biological spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) rule, which is compatible with the general framework for memristive devices. Finally, we propose a Laplace transform-based technique to derive the precise form of the mapping from state variables to cumulative conductance, replacing ad hoc voltage-current relationships with principled construction.
  We quantitatively validate the complete model against a rich set of experimental data from polymeric memristors exhibiting potentiation, synaptic-like plasticity and volatile decay. Our work presents a new paradigm for memristor modeling that is both practical for large-scale simulation and rich in explanatory power, providing a principled tool for the design of next-generation neuromorphic hardware.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种模块化、计算高效的忆阻器模型，整合了物理和计算神经科学原理，能够描述挥发性弛豫和突触可塑性等复杂动态，并通过拉普拉斯变换技术推导状态变量到累积电导的映射关系。
AI.motivation: 现有忆阻器紧凑模型通常无法描述复杂的动态特性，如挥发性弛豫和突触可塑性，这限制了大规模神经形态系统的仿真能力。需要一种既能保持计算效率又能描述这些复杂动态的模型。
AI.method: 提出模块化忆阻器模型框架，包含：1) 标准忆阻器件动态公式；2) 状态变量到累积电导的功能映射规则；3) 基于线性粘弹性理论的挥发性模块；4) 线性-非线性技术的饱和模块；5) 基于生物STDP规则的突触可塑性公式；6) 使用拉普拉斯变换推导状态变量到累积电导的精确映射关系。
AI.result: 模型在聚合物忆阻器的实验数据上进行了定量验证，展示了增强、突触样可塑性和挥发性衰减等特性。模型既适用于大规模仿真，又具有丰富的解释能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种忆阻器建模新范式，为下一代神经形态硬件设计提供了原理性工具，既实用又具有强大的解释能力。

title: Junction Conditions for General Gravitational Theories
summary: The junction conditions for general theories of gravity based on actions that depend on arbitrary functions of the curvature scalar invariants (including differential invariants) are obtained using the distributional formalism. In case of the existence of thin shells, a general expression for the shell energy-momentum is presented. The generalized Israel conditions are also obtained. The conditions for a proper matching, without shells, are also derived. The main results are: (i) shells arise if the $m$th-covariant derivative of the Riemann tensor is continuous at the matching hypersurface, where $m$ is the maximum order appearing in the Lagrangian density; (ii) a proper junction without thin shells requires further that the $(m+1)$-th derivative be also continuous, (iii) theories with $m=0$ that are quadratic in the scalar curvature invariants are special and unique for they allow for discontinuities of the Riemann tensor resulting in the existence of {\em thin shells and gravitational double layers} and (iv) General Relativity and $F(R)$ theories are extraordinary theories that admit shells of curvature (i.e. impulsive gravitational waves) because other theories require the absence of jumps of the second fundamental form across the matching hypersurface. All results are derived for a minimal coupling with the matter, but the strategy would be analogous for more general couplings.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了基于任意曲率标量不变量函数的广义引力理论的连接条件，建立了薄壳能量-动量张量的一般表达式，并获得了广义Israel条件。
AI.motivation: 研究广义引力理论（包括曲率标量不变量的任意函数）中的连接条件问题，特别是薄壳存在时的匹配条件，这对于理解不同时空区域如何连接以及引力波传播等物理现象具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用分布形式体系，推导基于任意曲率标量不变量函数的引力理论的连接条件，包括薄壳存在时的能量-动量张量表达式和广义Israel条件。
AI.result: 主要结果包括：(1) 当Riemann张量的m阶协变导数在匹配超曲面连续时出现薄壳，其中m是拉格朗日密度中的最高阶数；(2) 无薄壳的适当连接要求(m+1)阶导数也连续；(3) m=0且二次于曲率标量不变量的理论是特殊的，允许Riemann张量不连续，从而存在薄壳和引力双层；(4) 广义相对论和F(R)理论是特殊的，允许曲率壳（即脉冲引力波）。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统地建立了广义引力理论的连接条件框架，揭示了不同理论在匹配条件上的重要差异，特别是高阶导数理论对连接条件的额外约束，以及某些特殊理论允许的奇异结构。

title: Commissioning and Full Realization of the PLASEN System at BRIF
summary: A PLASEN (Precision LAser Spectroscopy for Exotic Nuclei) system, consisting of a compact radio-frequency quadrupole cooler-buncher (RFQ-cb) and a collinear resonance ionization spectroscopy setup, has now been fully commissioned with radioactive ion beams at the Beijing Radioactive Ion-beam Facility (BRIF). Using both stable and radioactive Rb ion beams from BRIF, we demonstrated that the large beam energy spread observed at BRIF has been successfully handled by employing the RFQ-cb, enabling the delivery of high-quality bunched radioactive ion beams for collinear resonance ionization spectroscopy experiments. Under these conditions, we performed laser spectroscopy of exotic nuclei, achieving high resolution (about 100 MHz spectral linewidth) and high sensitivity (up to 1:200 efficiency). This fully operational PLASEN system will serve as a state-of-the-art experimental platform at BRIF for research in multiple fields such as nuclear, atomic and molecular physics.

AI.tldr: PLASEN系统在北京放射性离子束装置上完成调试，结合RFQ冷却聚束器和共线共振电离光谱装置，成功处理了放射性离子束的大能量展宽，实现了高分辨率（约100MHz线宽）和高灵敏度（效率达1:200）的激光光谱测量。
AI.motivation: 北京放射性离子束装置产生的放射性离子束存在大能量展宽问题，这限制了高分辨率激光光谱实验的开展。需要开发能够处理这种能量展宽的系统，以实现对奇异核的高精度激光光谱研究。
AI.method: 采用紧凑型射频四极杆冷却聚束器（RFQ-cb）与共线共振电离光谱装置相结合的PLASEN系统。RFQ-cb用于冷却和聚束放射性离子束，处理其大能量展宽，然后送入共线共振电离光谱装置进行高分辨率激光光谱测量。
AI.result: 系统成功处理了BRIF产生的大能量展宽离子束，实现了约100MHz的谱线宽度和高灵敏度（效率达1:200）。使用稳定和放射性Rb离子束验证了系统性能，能够为奇异核激光光谱实验提供高质量的聚束放射性离子束。
AI.conclusion: PLASEN系统已完全投入运行，成为BRIF上最先进的实验平台，将在核物理、原子物理和分子物理等多个领域的研究中发挥重要作用，为奇异核的高精度激光光谱研究提供了关键技术支撑。

title: SNAPPY CubeSat Control Script Generation and Data File Processing
comment: Page Count: 11, Figure Count: 6, Table Count: 3; This is a pre-print article intended to be submitted for Nuclear Instruments and Methods A
summary: This is a document discussing the creation and usage of a server system dedicated to retrieving, processing, and storing data generated from the Solar Neutrino and Astro-Particle PhYsics (SNAPPY) CubeSat by the nuSOL (Neutrino Solar Orbiting Laboratory) Project. On a traditional desktop computer with CERN's ROOT and PostgreSQL software installed, and with a file system on two mirrored drives, it is possible to automatically process and organize incoming data, along with keeping a database to record each incoming file along with a command record. In addition to this, an application was created to provide a Graphical User Interface to assist with creating commands to communicate with the CubeSat. With that said, there are still plenty of plans to improve the software, mainly providing an automatic emailing system to notify team members when they are not around the server.

AI.tldr: 开发用于SNAPPY CubeSat数据处理的服务器系统，包含自动化数据处理、数据库管理和GUI命令生成工具
AI.motivation: 为nuSOL项目的SNAPPY CubeSat创建专门的数据处理系统，解决从卫星获取、处理和存储数据的自动化需求
AI.method: 在传统台式机上部署CERN ROOT和PostgreSQL软件，建立镜像驱动器文件系统，开发自动化数据处理流程和数据库记录系统，并创建图形用户界面用于生成卫星通信命令
AI.result: 成功构建了能够自动处理和组织传入数据的服务器系统，包含文件记录数据库和GUI命令生成工具
AI.conclusion: 系统已基本实现预期功能，但仍有改进空间，特别是需要添加自动邮件通知系统以在团队成员不在服务器旁时及时通知

title: Equivalent Circuit Modeling of Mutually Resistively Coupled Microwave Cavities with Enhanced Phase Sensitivity Using Thin Metallic Foils
summary: We formulate and validate an equivalent circuit model describing mutual resistive coupling between three microwave cavity resonators interconnected via thin metallic foils. Each cavity is represented as a lumped LCR circuit, while the foils act as a dissipative interface that mediates energy exchange via mutual resistance. This coupling mechanism produces interference effects and a controllable anti-resonance when the input resonators are amplitude- and phase-balanced, a behavior not achievable with standard microwave antenna probes. All three resonators operated in the TM$_{010}$ mode, where two input resonators each excited the third via a thin copper foil. Analytical expressions are derived for the mutual resistance and coupling coefficient of these foils in this geometry. Under balanced conditions, a sharp anti-resonance emerges with a near order-of-magnitude enhanced phase sensitivity at the resonant frequency of the output cavity, consistent with model predictions. The experimentally extracted mutual coupling coefficients, $Δ_{13}=(5.00\pm0.01)\times10^{-6}$ and $Δ_{23}=(4.10\pm0.01)\times10^{-6}$, fall within the calculated range $Δ_{n3}\approx(1\text{--}48)\times10^{-6}$ derived from the foil's electromagnetic properties, where the spread is dominated by the estimated foil thickness uncertainty of $(9\pm1)\,μ\mathrm{m}$. These results confirm that resistive coupling can occur across a number of skin depths of a metallic interface, providing a new means of engineering controlled interference in multi-resonator systems. The approach offers potential applications in precision microwave experiments, phase-sensitive detection, and tests of fundamental electromagnetic interactions.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出并验证了通过薄金属箔实现三个微波腔谐振器之间互阻耦合的等效电路模型，展示了可控的反谐振效应和增强的相位灵敏度。
AI.motivation: 探索金属箔作为耗散界面在微波谐振器之间实现互阻耦合的新机制，这种耦合能产生标准微波天线探头无法实现的干涉效应和可控反谐振，为多谐振器系统的受控干涉提供新手段。
AI.method: 将每个腔表示为集总LCR电路，薄金属箔作为耗散界面介导能量交换；推导了该几何结构中金属箔的互阻和耦合系数的解析表达式；实验上使用三个工作在TM_{010}模式的谐振器，其中两个输入谐振器通过薄铜箔激发第三个谐振器。
AI.result: 在平衡条件下观察到尖锐的反谐振，在输出腔谐振频率处相位灵敏度增强近一个数量级；实验提取的互耦合系数Δ_{13}=(5.00±0.01)×10^{-6}和Δ_{23}=(4.10±0.01)×10^{-6}落在计算范围Δ_{n3}≈(1-48)×10^{-6}内，该范围主要由箔厚度估计不确定度(9±1)μm决定。
AI.conclusion: 互阻耦合可以跨越金属界面的多个趋肤深度发生，为多谐振器系统的受控干涉工程提供了新方法，在精密微波实验、相位敏感检测和基本电磁相互作用测试中具有潜在应用。

title: Going into a tailspin near the abyss: analytic solutions for spinning particles on near equatorial, plunging orbits in Kerr spacetime
comment: 16 pages+appendices and references. 9 figures. Code is available on the GitHub repo:https://github.com/gabriel-andres-piovano/Analytic_Solutions_Spinning-Body-Hamilton-Jacobi
summary: This work presents, the first time, analytic solutions for the nearly equatorial, plunging motion of a spinning test-particle in Kerr spacetime. The equations of motion are solved at first-order in the small-body spin for all classes of plunging orbits with energy $E < 1$. The solutions incorporate the small precession of the orbital plane caused by the precession of the particle's spin. Additionally, we present the correction to the radius of the innermost bound circular orbit in closed form, and introduce a novel, Keplerian-like parametrization for generic plunging orbits. Our solutions will be useful in the modelling of inspiral-merger-ringdown waveforms with self-force methods and black hole perturbation theory.

AI.tldr: 首次推导出克尔时空中近赤道面旋转测试粒子坠入黑洞运动的解析解，适用于能量E<1的所有坠入轨道，包含小自旋引起的轨道面进动效应。
AI.motivation: 为自旋力方法和黑洞微扰理论中的旋进-合并-环降波形建模提供精确的解析解，改进引力波波形模板的精度。
AI.method: 在克尔时空中，对小自旋参数进行一阶展开，求解近赤道面坠入轨道的运动方程，包含自旋引起的轨道面进动效应。
AI.result: 获得了所有能量E<1的坠入轨道解析解，给出了最内束缚圆轨道半径的闭式修正，并提出了类开普勒参数化方法描述一般坠入轨道。
AI.conclusion: 这些解析解将有助于自旋力方法和黑洞微扰理论中的引力波波形建模，为精确描述旋转粒子坠入黑洞过程提供了新工具。

title: Fast array-based particle coincidence detection in a TimePix3-based velocity map imaging instrument
summary: With the development of high repetition rate laser sources and advanced multi-particle correlation analyses such as covariance mapping, particle detection techniques such as velocity map imaging (VMI) are poised to offer unprecedented views into molecular phenomena. Taking full advantage of the high count rates in these experiments requires the development of detectors with sufficient spatial and temporal resolution that can process data in real time. The TimePix3 camera (TPX3CAM) is an event-based pixel detector capable of spatio-temporally localizing many simultaneous particle hits in an efficient manner. While the sparse nature of the data stream allows for compact representation of particle hits, it also presents algorithmic and computational challenges for clustering individual pixels into hits. Here we present the theory and application of a rapid data processing and centroiding algorithm for ion and electron hits collected in a VMI instrument. The array-based computations that comprise the algorithm take full advantage of the data sparsity of the TimePix3 data stream and localize particle hits on the microchannel plate (MCP) to better than a single pixel on the pixel detector. Centroiding can be parallelized on a commercially available graphics processing unit (GPU) for additional speed. Using these innovations, data processing occurs about 25 times faster than data acquisition, for a 1 kHz repetition rate instrument and tens of particles per shot. In addition to its speed, the TPX3CAM detector outperforms state-of-the-art delay line anode detectors at discriminating multiple simultaneous hits, enabling high-fidelity coincidence and covariance studies in the near future.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于TimePix3相机和GPU加速的快速数据处理算法，用于速度成像质谱仪，实现高重复率激光实验中的实时粒子检测和质心定位。
AI.motivation: 随着高重复率激光源和先进多粒子关联分析技术的发展，需要开发能够处理高计数率数据、具有足够时空分辨率的探测器系统，以充分利用实验数据。
AI.method: 采用TimePix3相机作为事件驱动像素探测器，开发了基于阵列计算的快速数据处理和质心定位算法，利用数据稀疏性特点，并在商用GPU上实现并行化加速。
AI.result: 算法能够将粒子击中定位到微通道板上优于单个像素的精度，数据处理速度比数据采集快约25倍（针对1kHz重复率仪器），在多粒子同时击中分辨能力上优于最先进的延迟线阳极探测器。
AI.conclusion: TimePix3相机结合GPU加速算法为速度成像质谱仪提供了高效的实时数据处理方案，有望在未来实现高保真度的符合测量和协方差研究。

title: A Fast Generative Framework for High-dimensional Posterior Sampling: Application to CMB Delensing
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures. ML4Astro 2025 workshop paper on fast generative posterior sampling with application to CMB delensing
summary: We introduce a deep generative framework for high-dimensional Bayesian inference that enables efficient posterior sampling. As telescopes and simulations rapidly expand the volume and resolution of astrophysical data, fast simulation-based inference methods are increasingly needed to extract scientific insights. While diffusion-based approaches offer high-quality generative capabilities, they are hindered by slow sampling speeds. Our method performs posterior sampling an order of magnitude faster than a diffusion baseline. Applied to the problem of CMB delensing, it successfully recovers the unlensed CMB power spectrum from simulated observations. The model also remains robust to shifts in cosmological parameters, demonstrating its potential for out-of-distribution generalization and application to observational cosmological data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于高维贝叶斯推断的深度生成框架，比扩散模型快一个数量级，应用于CMB去透镜任务，能恢复未透镜CMB功率谱，且对宇宙学参数变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着望远镜和模拟数据在体积和分辨率上的快速增长，需要快速的基于模拟的推断方法来提取科学见解。虽然扩散模型具有高质量的生成能力，但采样速度较慢。
AI.method: 提出一个深度生成框架，用于高维贝叶斯推断，实现高效的后验采样。该方法比扩散基线快一个数量级。
AI.result: 应用于CMB去透镜问题，成功从模拟观测中恢复了未透镜的CMB功率谱。模型对宇宙学参数的变化保持鲁棒，展示了在分布外泛化和应用于观测宇宙学数据的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维贝叶斯推断提供了高效的生成框架，在CMB去透镜任务中表现优异，具有处理观测宇宙学数据的潜力。

title: Inflation in fractional Newtonian cosmology
summary: In this paper, we investigate the evolution of the early universe within the framework of fractional Newtonian cosmology. By constructing a suitable fractional potential, we show that the cosmological evolution can naturally originate from a non-singular pre-inflationary regime. We find a natural transition time, separating the pre-inflationary and inflationary regimes, characterized by the balance of the corresponding forces. By analyzing the dynamics near the transition time, we show that the inflationary phase emerges as a stable dynamical attractor. We show that the fractional force vanishes and undergoes a sign change at a point very close to the end of inflation. We then determine the small separation between the force zero point and the end of inflation, and show that it leads to a meaningful relation between the number of $e$-folds and the fractional parameter $α$, ensuring consistency with observations and resolving the horizon problem. Moreover, our results demonstrate the existence of a graceful exit from inflation, followed by an exact radiation-dominated solution with the standard time dependence and an $α$-dependent normalization.

AI.tldr: 分数牛顿宇宙学框架下，早期宇宙演化从非奇异暴胀前状态自然过渡到暴胀阶段，并实现优雅退出到辐射主导时期。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙在分数牛顿宇宙学框架下的演化，探索宇宙如何从非奇异暴胀前状态自然过渡到暴胀阶段，并解决视界问题。
AI.method: 构建合适的分数势能，分析宇宙演化动力学，确定暴胀前和暴胀阶段之间的自然过渡时间，研究力平衡和稳定性。
AI.result: 发现分数力在暴胀结束点附近消失并改变符号，确定力零点与暴胀结束点之间的微小分离，建立了e折叠数与分数参数α的关系，确保与观测一致并解决视界问题。
AI.conclusion: 分数牛顿宇宙学能够自然地描述早期宇宙从非奇异暴胀前状态到暴胀阶段的演化，实现优雅退出到辐射主导时期，并与观测一致。

title: NEXUS: Quick Release Notes
comment: This is an arXiv-only document that describes the quick data releases from the NEXUS-JWST program through 2028. This document will be updated regularly to follow the cadenced observations from NEXUS (with a delay of ~2 months after each epoch). Data products are available at https://ariel.astro.illinois.edu/nexus/qdr/. Please send comments and suggestions to M. Zhuang and Y. Shen
summary: NEXUS is a JWST Multi-Cycle (Cycles 3-5) GO Treasury imaging and spectroscopic survey around the North Ecliptic Pole during 2024-2028. It contains two overlapping tiers in depth and area coverage. The Wide tier ($\sim 400~{\rm arcmin}^2$) performs NIRCam/WFSS 2.4-5 $μ$m grism spectroscopy with three annual epochs over 3 years (final spectral continuum ${\rm S/N/pixel>3}$ at F444W $<22.2$), accompanied by NIRCam multi-band imaging in F090W, F115W, F150W, F200W, F356W and F444W. The Deep tier ($\sim 50~{\rm arcmin}^2$) performs high-multiplexing NIRSpec 0.54-5.5 $μ$m MOS/PRISM spectroscopy for ~10,000 targets in total, over 18 epochs with a 2-month cadence, along with F200W+F444W NIRCam imaging for each epoch. Parallel imaging observations with MIRI and additional NIRCam filters are also performed within the Wide and Deep tiers. The primary data covering the Deep tier (including NIRCam imaging, NIRSpec/MSA spectra, and vetted MSA spectroscopic redshifts) are released in regular Quick Data Releases to facilitate follow-up studies. This evolving document describes the MSA targeting information and observing status for each of the 18 Deep epochs, which started in May 2025 and continue on the regular 2-month cadence. We also describe the content and caveats of the quick release data and report selected cases of diverse scientific interests.

AI.tldr: NEXUS是JWST多周期GO巡天项目，包含宽场和深场两个层级，进行NIRCam成像/光谱和NIRSpec MOS光谱观测，数据定期快速发布。
AI.motivation: 通过JWST在北黄极区域进行多波段成像和光谱观测，获取深度和时间序列数据，支持星系演化、活动星系核、瞬变源等多样科学研究。
AI.method: 采用两层级观测策略：宽场层（~400 arcmin²）进行NIRCam/WFSS光谱（2.4-5μm）和6波段成像，每年3个历元；深场层（~50 arcmin²）进行NIRSpec MOS/PRISM光谱（0.54-5.5μm）和F200W+F444W成像，18个历元，每2个月一次。
AI.result: 深场层数据（包括NIRCam成像、NIRSpec光谱和验证的红移）定期快速发布，已从2025年5月开始观测，报告了多样科学案例。
AI.conclusion: NEXUS项目提供JWST深度多历元观测数据，通过定期数据发布促进后续研究，支持星系形成、活动星系核、瞬变源等前沿科学研究。

title: Search for continuous gravitational waves from neutron stars in five globular clusters in the first part of the fourth LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA observing run
summary: We present the results of directed searches for continuous gravitational waves from unknown neutron stars in five Milky Way globular clusters. We carry out the searches in the LIGO data from the first eight months of the fourth LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA observing run using the WEAVE semi-coherent program, which sums matched-filter detection-statistic values over many time segments spanning the observation period. No gravitational wave signal is detected in the search band of 20-475 Hz for assumed source ages greater than 300 years. Injections of simulated continuous wave signals in the data indicate that we achieve the most sensitive results to date across most of the explored parameter space volume, obtaining median 95% confidence level upper limits as low as $\sim 4.2 \times 10^{-26}$ near 282 Hz for NGC 6397.

AI.tldr: 对五个银河系球状星团中未知中子星连续引力波的定向搜索，使用LIGO数据，未发现信号，但获得了迄今最灵敏的上限
AI.motivation: 搜索银河系球状星团中未知中子星发出的连续引力波，这些星团是致密天体（包括中子星）的丰富来源，可能产生可探测的引力波信号
AI.method: 使用WEAVE半相干程序分析LIGO第四观测期前八个月的数据，在20-475 Hz频带内搜索，假设源年龄大于300年，通过匹配滤波检测统计量在多个时间段的求和来增强灵敏度
AI.result: 未探测到引力波信号，但在大部分参数空间获得了迄今最灵敏的结果，对NGC 6397在282 Hz附近的95%置信水平上限达到约4.2×10⁻²⁶
AI.conclusion: 虽然未探测到连续引力波信号，但搜索方法显著提高了灵敏度，为未来观测提供了更严格的上限和更好的探测前景

title: PulSKASim: A Pulsar Simulator for SKA-Scale Interferometric Observations
comment: Accepted by Astronomical Data Analysis Software and Systems (ADASS) XXXV 2025
summary: Accurate simulation of pulsar flux variability is critical for testing Square Kilometre Array (SKA) interferometric pipelines. However, most existing simulators neglect the effects of integration time and related observational parameters, limiting their realism and utility for interferometric end-to-end testing. To address these shortcomings, we develop a Pulsar Simulator for SKA-scale interferometric observations (PulSKASim), which models pulsar flux evolution across pulsar period, maximum flux, duty cycle, and noise, accounting for integration time, sampling, and observation duration, and naturally models flux smoothing that arises from finite integration within each dump time. PulSKASim generates synthetic measurement sets using functions in simulators for radio interferometers, such as OSKAR and Pyuvsim, where each snapshot contains pulsars with controlled flux levels, enabling realistic per-time-slot experiments. This simulator allows for detailed assessment of calibration, imaging, and detection pipelines under realistic SKA-like conditions, bridging pulsar variability modelling with interferometric simulation in a way not achievable by existing tools.

AI.tldr: 开发了PulSKASim脉冲星模拟器，专门用于SKA规模干涉测量观测，考虑了积分时间等观测参数，能更真实地模拟脉冲星通量变化，用于测试干涉测量数据处理流程。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲星模拟器大多忽略积分时间及相关观测参数的影响，限制了其真实性和对干涉测量端到端测试的实用性，无法满足SKA干涉测量管道测试的需求。
AI.method: 开发PulSKASim模拟器，建模脉冲星通量随脉冲周期、最大通量、占空比和噪声的演化，考虑积分时间、采样和观测时长，自然地模拟有限积分时间导致的通量平滑效应，使用OSKAR和Pyuvsim等干涉测量模拟器函数生成合成测量集。
AI.result: PulSKASim能够生成包含受控通量水平脉冲星的合成测量集，每个时间快照都包含脉冲星通量变化，为SKA类条件下的校准、成像和检测管道评估提供了现实测试环境。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟器填补了现有工具的空白，将脉冲星变异性建模与干涉测量模拟相结合，为SKA干涉测量管道在真实条件下的详细评估提供了重要工具。

title: Dyonic hairy black holes in $U(1)$ gauge-invariant scalar-vector-tensor theories: Cubic and quartic interactions
summary: We construct and classify asymptotically flat, static, spherically symmetric hairy black hole solutions in $U(1)$ gauge-invariant scalar-vector-tensor (SVT) theories carrying both electric and magnetic charges. Extending previous studies beyond the quadratic sector, we systematically incorporate cubic and quartic interaction terms in the presence of the magnetic charge. We derive a consistency condition for the quartic interaction that eliminates higher-order derivative terms induced by the magnetic charge, ensuring the theory remains second-order. We classify the obtained solutions based on their symmetry properties: shift-symmetric couplings yield secondary hair governed by the Noether current, whereas $φ$-dependent interactions generate primary hair. Crucially, our analysis reveals that the magnetic charge plays a key role in activating specific interaction sectors such as the cubic coupling $\tilde{f}_3$, which does not appear in the field equations in purely electric configurations. We identify solution branches that are intrinsic to the magnetic charge, as they cease to exist in the vanishing monopole limit ($P\to 0$). Furthermore, we demonstrate that the scalar hair exhibits distinct asymptotic decay rates depending on the interaction type, suggesting possible variations in observational signatures. Finally, we verify the global regularity of these solutions by connecting analytic expansions with numerical integration.

AI.tldr: 在U(1)规范不变的标量-矢量-张量理论中，构建并分类了同时携带电和磁荷的渐近平坦静态球对称毛状黑洞解，揭示了磁荷在激活特定相互作用项中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 扩展先前仅考虑二次项的研究，系统性地在磁荷存在下纳入三次和四次相互作用项，探索磁荷如何影响毛状黑洞解的性质和分类。
AI.method: 通过推导四次相互作用的相容性条件消除高阶导数项，确保理论保持二阶；基于对称性对解进行分类：平移对称耦合产生由诺特流支配的次级毛，而φ依赖相互作用产生初级毛；通过解析展开与数值积分验证解的全局正则性。
AI.result: 发现磁荷在激活特定相互作用项（如三次耦合f̃₃）中起关键作用，这些项在纯电配置中不出现场方程；识别出仅存在于磁荷非零情况下的解分支；标量毛的渐近衰减速率随相互作用类型而变化，暗示可能的观测特征差异。
AI.conclusion: 磁荷不仅丰富了毛状黑洞解的结构，还激活了理论中原本不活跃的相互作用项，为探索标量-矢量-张量理论中黑洞的观测特征提供了新的可能性。

title: AstroInspect: a web-based system to organize, assess, and visually inspect astronomical objects
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, accepted in AJ
summary: The rapid growth of imaging and spectroscopic surveys has intensified the need for efficient tools that support visual inspection, a practice that remains essential for tasks such as classification, catalog refinement, and validation of automated methods. Existing solutions, however, often require the use of multiple platforms and complex workflows to integrate heterogeneous data. To address this challenge, we present the first release of the AstroInspect (https://astroinspect.github.io), a web-based system which ensures seamless access to several astronomical resources. The system provides an intuitive graphical user interface (GUI) through which users can upload catalogs of objects defined by celestial coordinates. AstroInspect automatically enriches these catalogs with complementary information, including imaging, spectroscopic, and photometric data retrieved in real time from surveys such as the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS), the Legacy Surveys (LS), and the Southern Photometric Local Universe Survey (S-PLUS). As an example of its scientific utility, we used AstroInspect to identify H$α$ emission-line galaxies within a 7 deg radius in the direction of the Hydra I cluster (also known as Abell 1060) by visual inspection. Using a candidate set of 981 galaxies selected from S-PLUS photometric data, we produced a catalog of 80 galaxies with confirmed H$α$ emission. These results highlight the potential of AstroInspect to support efficient visual inspection workflows.

AI.tldr: AstroInspect是一个基于Web的天文数据可视化检查系统，能够自动整合多源观测数据，支持高效的人工目视检查工作流。
AI.motivation: 随着成像和光谱巡天数据的快速增长，需要高效的工具来支持目视检查，这对分类、星表精化和自动化方法验证等任务至关重要。现有解决方案通常需要多个平台和复杂工作流来整合异构数据。
AI.method: 开发了基于Web的AstroInspect系统，提供直观的图形用户界面。用户可以上传由天球坐标定义的星表，系统自动从SDSS、LS、S-PLUS等巡天中实时检索并整合成像、光谱和测光数据。
AI.result: 使用AstroInspect在长蛇座I星系团方向7度半径内识别了Hα发射线星系。从S-PLUS测光数据选出的981个候选星系中，通过目视检查确认了80个具有Hα发射的星系。
AI.conclusion: AstroInspect展示了支持高效目视检查工作流的潜力，能够无缝访问多个天文资源，简化了异构数据整合过程。

title: A loop quantization of the marginally bound Lemaître-Tolman-Bondi dust model
summary: We present a loop quantization of the marginally bound Lemaître-Tolman-Bondi (LTB) model, describing the gravitational collapse of pressureless dust in spherical symmetry. The full quantum LTB model is constructed as a collection of non-interacting shells, each governed by an individual single-shell loop quantum dynamics. We show that the single-shell evolution is non-singular and that wave packets initially peaked on a collapsing trajectory undergo a bounce at Planckian energy densities and subsequently follow an expanding classical trajectory, resolving the classical central curvature singularity. We also compare the loop quantum theory with the Wheeler-DeWitt quantization of the same model and assess the accuracy of the loop quantum gravity effective theory in reproducing the full quantum dynamics. Specifically, we find that initially collapsing wave packets generically develop an interference pattern at the bounce, which suppresses the accuracy of the effective theory near the center of the dust cloud.

AI.tldr: 本文对边际束缚的Lemaître-Tolman-Bondi模型进行了圈量子化，解决了压力尘埃球对称引力坍缩中的奇点问题，发现量子演化是非奇异的，坍缩波包在普朗克能量密度处反弹，并比较了圈量子引力与Wheeler-DeWitt量子化的差异。
AI.motivation: 研究引力坍缩中的奇点问题，特别是压力尘埃球对称坍缩的Lemaître-Tolman-Bondi模型，通过圈量子引力方法解决经典理论中的中心曲率奇点问题。
AI.method: 采用圈量子化方法构建完整的量子LTB模型，将系统视为非相互作用的壳层集合，每个壳层由独立的单壳层圈量子动力学控制。通过分析单壳层演化，研究波包在坍缩过程中的行为。
AI.result: 单壳层演化是非奇异的，初始坍缩的波包在普朗克能量密度处发生反弹，随后遵循膨胀的经典轨迹，从而解决了经典中心曲率奇点。圈量子引力与Wheeler-DeWitt量子化存在差异，特别是在反弹点附近坍缩波包会产生干涉图案，这降低了有效理论在尘埃云中心附近的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 圈量子引力方法成功解决了LTB模型中的引力坍缩奇点问题，实现了非奇异的量子演化。然而，反弹点附近的量子干涉效应表明圈量子引力有效理论在描述完整量子动力学时存在局限性，特别是在尘埃云中心区域。

title: A New Method for Identifying Contaminating Sources and Locating Target Sources through the Cross-Arm Features of Micro Pore Optics
summary: The Pathfinder of the Type-A satellites in the Chasing All Transients Constellation Hunters (CATCH) space mission is equipped with Micro-Pore Optics (MPOs) and four single-pixel Silicon Drift Detectors (SDDs). Due to the lack of position resolution in an individual SDD, we propose a new method based on the cross-arms in the point spread function (PSF) of MPOs to enhance the satellite's capability in identifying contaminating sources and locating target sources. By placing one detector on each of the horizontal and vertical cross-arms on the focal plane, we can use the changes in the relative counts on the cross-arms detectors to deduce the location of the source. Simulated observations demonstrate that, for a target source with a flux of 1 Crab and an exposure time of 200 s, the cross-arms detectors can identify contaminating source with the same flux level at an off-axis angle larger than 8', and improve positioning accuracy to 6'. Furthermore, we extend the simulation study to CATCH Type-A, which plans to use an SDD array. In situations where sources exhibit the same flux of 1 Crab and the exposure time is merely 1 s, a 16x16 SDD array is capable of identifying contaminating source with an off-axis angle greater than 2.4' and can achieve a positioning precision of 1.8'.

AI.tldr: 提出基于微孔光学系统十字臂点扩散函数的新方法，用于增强卫星识别污染源和定位目标源的能力，通过十字臂探测器相对计数变化推断源位置。
AI.motivation: CATCH空间任务中Type-A卫星的单个硅漂移探测器缺乏位置分辨率，需要增强卫星识别污染源和定位目标源的能力。
AI.method: 利用微孔光学系统的十字臂点扩散函数，在焦平面上水平和垂直十字臂各放置一个探测器，通过十字臂探测器相对计数变化推断源的位置。
AI.result: 模拟观测显示：对于1 Crab流量的目标源和200秒曝光时间，十字臂探测器能识别8'离轴角以上的相同流量污染源，定位精度达6'。扩展到16x16 SDD阵列时，1秒曝光时间下能识别2.4'离轴角以上的污染源，定位精度达1.8'。
AI.conclusion: 基于微孔光学系统十字臂点扩散函数的方法能有效增强卫星识别污染源和定位目标源的能力，为CATCH Type-A卫星的SDD阵列设计提供了重要参考。

title: Observational and Thermodynamic aspects of one-dimensional Dark Energy EoS parametrization models
summary: We examine the observational viability and physical implications of the Gong-Zhang (GZ) dark--energy equation-of-state parametrizations using exclusively late-time cosmological probes. Two one-dimensional parametrization models, GZ-Type~I and GZ-Type~II, are constrained with Type~Ia supernovae (Union3, Pantheon+SH0ES, and DES-SN5YR), DESI baryon acoustic oscillations, and cosmic chronometer measurements of $H(z)$. Bayesian inference combined with information-criteria diagnostics shows that both parametrizations provide competitive alternatives to $Λ$CDM, while the GZ-Type~II model is consistently favored, exhibiting reduced parameter degeneracy and stronger Jeffreys-scale support. Beyond background expansion tests, we employ configuration entropy as a thermodynamically motivated probe of structure formation. We demonstrate that the entropy-production rate sensitively traces the impact of dynamical dark energy on late-time gravitational clustering while preserving standard early-time behavior. Our results establish the Gong-Zhang framework as a physically transparent and observationally consistent extension of $Λ$CDM, with configuration entropy providing a complementary diagnostic of late-time cosmic acceleration.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用晚期宇宙学观测数据评估了Gong-Zhang暗能量状态方程参数化模型，发现GZ-Type II模型优于ΛCDM，并利用构型熵作为结构形成的热力学探针验证了动态暗能量对晚期引力成团的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究Gong-Zhang暗能量参数化模型的观测可行性，探索ΛCDM模型的替代方案，并寻找能够敏感追踪动态暗能量对晚期结构形成影响的新诊断工具。
AI.method: 使用晚期宇宙学观测数据（Ia型超新星、DESI重子声学振荡、宇宙计时器H(z)测量）约束两种一维GZ参数化模型，结合贝叶斯推断和信息准则诊断，并引入构型熵作为热力学探针分析结构形成。
AI.result: GZ-Type II模型在参数简并性减少和Jeffreys尺度支持方面优于ΛCDM；构型熵产生率能敏感追踪动态暗能量对晚期引力成团的影响，同时保持早期标准行为。
AI.conclusion: Gong-Zhang框架是ΛCDM的物理透明且观测一致的扩展，构型熵为晚期宇宙加速提供了互补诊断工具，GZ-Type II模型是更有前景的暗能量参数化方案。

title: MWA tied-array processing V: Super-resolved localisation via amplitude-only maximum likelihood direction finding
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication in PASA
summary: Interferometric localisation of transients and pulsars via tied-array beam processing is challenging and can be limited by the native spatial resolution achievable by the instrument, especially at low frequencies and for compact interferometers. Knowledge of the telescope primary and tied-array beam patterns allows the exploitation of the beam structures and the relationship to measured quantities, such as signal-to-noise ratio, through radio direction finding techniques. The additional information provides a "super-resolved" localisation (i.e., where the precision is much better than the native spatial resolution) of a source when there are multiple detections in adjacent tied-array beams. We demonstrate this approach using the Murchison Widefield Array (MWA) and its voltage capture and tied-array processing capabilities, with a specific focus on how it benefits the on-going Southern-sky MWA Rapid Two-metre pulsar survey as it starts producing more candidates requiring follow-up. Examples of localisations with previously discovered MWA pulsars which were subsequently localised via imaging with higher spatial resolution interferometers are used to validate the process, along with localisations of a sample of known pulsars to demonstrate the robustness of the method and its uncertainty estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出利用射电望远镜主波束和合成波束模式，通过波束结构和信噪比关系实现"超分辨率"定位的方法，在MWA望远镜上验证了该技术对瞬变源和脉冲星定位的有效性。
AI.motivation: 干涉测量法对瞬变源和脉冲星的定位受限于仪器的固有空间分辨率，特别是在低频和紧凑干涉仪情况下。需要一种能够超越固有分辨率限制的定位方法。
AI.method: 利用望远镜主波束和合成波束模式的知识，通过波束结构和信噪比等测量量之间的关系，应用射电测向技术。当相邻合成波束中有多个探测时，该方法能提供"超分辨率"定位。
AI.result: 使用MWA望远镜及其电压捕获和合成波束处理能力验证了该方法。通过已知脉冲星的定位与更高分辨率干涉仪成像结果的对比验证了过程的准确性，并展示了方法的稳健性和不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实现超越仪器固有空间分辨率的定位精度，对MWA快速两米脉冲星巡天等项目的后续候选源跟踪具有重要意义，为紧凑干涉仪的低频观测提供了有效的定位解决方案。

title: Strong breaking of black-hole uniqueness from coexisting scalarization mechanisms
summary: Black-hole uniqueness, i.e., the statement that all stationary vacuum black holes in the universe are described by the Kerr solution, is expected to break in theories beyond General Relativity. This breaking can take a particularly strong form, if several branches of black-hole solutions beyond the Kerr solution coexist. We find an example of a theory that exhibits such strong breaking. In this theory, a cubic coupling of a scalar field to the Gauss-Bonnet invariant triggers black-hole scalarization through a non-linear instability of the Kerr solution. At large spin, curvature-induced and spin-induced scalarization mechanisms compete at fixed sign of the coupling. This results in a rich phase structure of black-hole solutions and continuous as well as discontinuous transitions between the different branches of black holes.

AI.tldr: 研究发现一个超越广义相对论的理论中，黑洞唯一性被强烈打破，存在多个超越克尔解的黑洞分支共存。
AI.motivation: 黑洞唯一性（即所有稳态真空黑洞都可用克尔解描述）在超越广义相对论的理论中预期会被打破。本研究旨在寻找这种破坏的强烈形式，即多个超越克尔解的黑洞分支共存的情况。
AI.method: 研究一个包含标量场与高斯-博内不变量立方耦合的理论。该理论中，克尔解通过非线性不稳定性触发黑洞标量化。在高自旋情况下，曲率诱导和自旋诱导的标量化机制在固定耦合符号下相互竞争。
AI.result: 发现了丰富的黑洞解相结构，包括连续和不连续的相变。不同黑洞分支之间存在多种过渡方式，形成了复杂的相图。
AI.conclusion: 该理论确实展现了黑洞唯一性的强烈破坏，多个黑洞分支共存的现象为超越广义相对论的黑洞物理提供了新的研究视角。

title: Sensitivity of a closed dielectric haloscope to axion dark matter
summary: We present a method to determine the sensitivity of a closed dielectric haloscope to axion dark matter. Dielectric haloscopes aim to probe the theoretically well-motivated axion mass range of ~26 $\mathrmμ$eV to ~500 $\mathrmμ$eV by utilizing a stack of dielectric disks and a mirror to enhance the axion-photon conversion within an external magnetic field. Their conversion volume is nearly axion-mass independent, thereby favoring large-scale designs to increase sensitivity. The large volume causes simulations to be computationally expensive and time-consuming. This paper presents a simple model that can be used to determine the sensitivity of the experiment with minimal computational resources. The model is able to describe the electromagnetic response of a closed dielectric haloscope, accounting for realistic geometric imperfections, as well as the noise introduced by the receiver system. It is applied to data taken with a MAgnetized Disk and Mirror Axion Experiment (MADMAX) prototype within the 1.6 T Morpurgo magnet at CERN. This work underpins the first axion dark matter search using a dielectric haloscope and provides the foundation for future dark matter searches with MADMAX.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算封闭式介电晕镜对轴子暗物质灵敏度的简化模型，减少计算资源需求，并应用于MADMAX原型实验
AI.motivation: 介电晕镜旨在探测26-500 μeV轴子质量范围，但大体积设计导致模拟计算成本高昂，需要简化模型来快速确定实验灵敏度
AI.method: 开发一个简单模型来描述封闭式介电晕镜的电磁响应，考虑几何缺陷和接收系统噪声，应用于CERN的MADMAX原型实验数据
AI.result: 该模型能够以最小计算资源确定实验灵敏度，支撑了首个使用介电晕镜的轴子暗物质搜索，为未来MADMAX暗物质搜索奠定基础
AI.conclusion: 提出的简化模型有效解决了介电晕镜大体积设计的计算挑战，为介电晕镜技术在轴子暗物质探测中的应用提供了实用工具

title: External magnetic field influence on massive binary black hole inspiral gravitational waves and its similarity with environmental effects
summary: Magnetic fields represent a critical component of astrophysical research, laying the foundation for interpreting high-energy astrophysical activity across galactic scales. In this work, we investigate the parametrized post-Einsteinian (ppE) waveform imprints induced by the external magnetic fields of Bertotti-Robinson and Bonnor-Melvin black holes, with the aim of distinguishing such magnetic effects from environmental influences--particularly for massive black holes posited to reside at galactic centers. We first compute the ppE frequency-domain waveform for a small black hole inspiraling into a massive Kerr-Bertotti-Robinson (KBR) black hole, which corresponds to a Kerr black hole embedded in an external magnetic field. We find that the leading-order correction arising from the magnetic field is at the $-2$ post-Newtonian (PN) order relative to the quadrupole term, while the next-leading-order correction is at $-1.5$ PN, originating from the spin of the black hole. We further examine the effects of a spinning Kerr-Bonnor-Melvin (KBM) black hole, whose leading-order magnetic correction is at $-3$ PN (consistent with the preceding result), whereas its spin-induced correction is also at $-1.5$ PN. The leading-order ppE corrections for both KBR and KBM black holes do not appear degenerate with any modified theory of gravity effects; nonetheless, we demonstrate that they resemble the gravitational pull contributions from additional matter with power-law distributions of index $γ=1$ and $γ=0$, respectively. As a result, future gravitational wave (GW) observations detecting $-3$ or $-2$ PN order corrections will infer their origin as either magnetic field effects or matter environmental influences.

AI.tldr: 研究黑洞外部磁场对引力波波形的参数化后爱因斯坦修正，分析Kerr-Bertotti-Robinson和Kerr-Bonnor-Melvin黑洞的磁场效应，发现主要修正出现在-2PN和-3PN阶，与物质环境效应存在简并性。
AI.motivation: 磁场是天体物理研究的关键组成部分，对于解释星系尺度的高能天体物理活动至关重要。本研究旨在区分黑洞外部磁场效应与环境影响，特别是对于可能位于星系中心的超大质量黑洞。
AI.method: 计算小质量黑洞螺旋进入Kerr-Bertotti-Robinson和Kerr-Bonnor-Melvin黑洞的参数化后爱因斯坦频域波形，分析磁场和自旋对引力波波形的修正阶数。
AI.result: KBR黑洞的磁场主导修正出现在-2PN阶，自旋修正出现在-1.5PN阶；KBM黑洞的磁场主导修正出现在-3PN阶，自旋修正同样在-1.5PN阶。这些修正与指数γ=1和γ=0的幂律分布物质环境效应相似。
AI.conclusion: 未来引力波观测中检测到-3PN或-2PN阶修正时，需要区分其来源是磁场效应还是物质环境影响，因为这些效应在波形上表现出相似特征。

title: Fusion of JWST data - Demonstrating practical feasibility
summary: Data fusion is a computational process widely used in Earth observation to generate high-resolution hyperspectral data cubes with two spatial and one spectral dimensions. It merges data from instruments with complementary characteristics: one with low spatial but high spectral resolutions, and another with high spatial but low spectral resolutions. In astronomy, the use of such instrumental combinations is becoming increasingly common, making data fusion a promising approach for enhancing observational data. Until now, however, its application to astronomical data has remained unsuccessful. We present the first successful astronomical data fusion using JWST integral field spectroscopy with NIRSpec and imaging across 29 filters with NIRCam. Applied to observations of the d203-506 protoplanetary disk in Orion and of Titan, our method produces fused hyperspectral cubes with NIRCam spatial and NIRSpec spectral resolutions. These results pave the way for extracting the physical properties from JWST data with unprecedented spatial resolution and showcase the transformative potential of data fusion in astronomy.

AI.tldr: 首次成功将数据融合技术应用于天文数据，使用JWST的NIRSpec和NIRCam观测数据，生成高空间分辨率和高光谱分辨率的融合数据立方体
AI.motivation: 数据融合在地球观测中已广泛应用，但在天文领域一直未成功应用。随着天文观测中互补特性仪器组合的日益普遍，数据融合有望提升天文观测数据质量
AI.method: 使用JWST的NIRSpec积分场光谱仪和NIRCam的29个滤光片成像数据，将低空间高光谱分辨率数据与高空间低光谱分辨率数据进行融合
AI.result: 成功应用于猎户座d203-506原行星盘和土卫六观测，生成了具有NIRCam空间分辨率和NIRSpec光谱分辨率的融合高光谱数据立方体
AI.conclusion: 这为从JWST数据中以前所未有的空间分辨率提取物理特性开辟了道路，展示了数据融合在天文学中的变革潜力

title: Double-sphere enhanced optomechanical spectroscopy constrains symmetron dark energy
summary: Screened scalar fields such as the symmetron provide a viable description of dark energy yet their laboratory detection remains challenging. We propose an optomechanical scheme to constrain symmetron interactions using two optically levitated nanospheres inside a cavity. The symmetron-mediated interaction induces an effective coupling which leads to a measurable splitting in the optomechanical resonance spectrum. We forecast constraints in the regime $μ\sim 10^{-2}$eV-$10^{-4}$ eV, which shows that this approach can improve existing laboratory bounds by up to several orders of magnitude, demonstrating the sensitivity of optomechanical spectroscopy to screened fifth forces.

AI.tldr: 提出利用光悬浮纳米球在腔内的光力学方案来约束对称子相互作用，通过测量光力学共振谱分裂来探测暗能量标量场
AI.motivation: 对称子等屏蔽标量场是暗能量的可能描述，但实验室探测仍然困难，需要新的高灵敏度探测方案
AI.method: 使用两个光学悬浮纳米球在腔内，通过对称子介导的相互作用产生有效耦合，测量光力学共振谱的分裂
AI.result: 预测在μ∼10^{-2}eV-10^{-4}eV范围内可施加约束，比现有实验室界限提高几个数量级
AI.conclusion: 光力学光谱学对屏蔽第五力的敏感性很高，该方法能显著改进对称子相互作用的实验约束

title: Simultaneous Misalignment and Mode Mismatch Sensing in Optical Cavities Using Intensity-Only Measurements
summary: Precise sensing and control of spatial mode content is essential for the performance of precision optical systems, particularly interferometric gravitational-wave detectors, where misalignment and mode mismatch can lead to significant optical losses and degraded quantum noise suppression. Conventional approaches, including heterodyne wavefront sensing and phase camera techniques, are effective but can be limited by hardware complexity and systematic uncertainties arising from restricted reference-beam overlap. This paper presents a novel two-step deep learning pipeline for robust beam diagnostics based solely on beam intensity images. In the first stage, a multi-intensity-image convolutional neural network (CNN) performs accurate mode decomposition, recovering the complex modal content of distorted beams. In the second stage, the predicted mode coefficients are fed into a downstream regression network that simultaneously estimates all eight degrees of freedom (DoFs) associated with misalignment and mode mismatch, including beam tilt, lateral offset, and waist size and position mismatches in both transverse directions. The proposed CNN-based framework achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.0034 in the mode decomposition stage, which propagates to a total MAE of 0.0062 in the recovered beam imperfection parameters at the final stage. This corresponds to an average residual optical loss of 39 ppm per DoF (310 ppm total). This approach relies only on standard CCD imaging and is robust to random intensity noise, eliminating the need for complex interferometric hardware. The results demonstrate that the proposed deep learning pipeline enables real-time, high-accuracy wavefront sensing and mode-mismatch diagnostics, providing a scalable and hardware-efficient tool for improving the stability and sensitivity of precision optical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的双阶段光束诊断方法，仅使用强度图像即可实现高精度模式分解和光束缺陷参数估计，无需复杂干涉硬件。
AI.motivation: 在精密光学系统（特别是引力波探测器）中，光束对准和模式匹配问题会导致显著的光学损耗和量子噪声抑制退化。传统方法如外差波前传感和相位相机技术受限于硬件复杂性和参考光束重叠不足带来的系统不确定性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段深度学习流水线：第一阶段使用多强度图像卷积神经网络（CNN）进行精确模式分解，恢复失真光束的复杂模态内容；第二阶段将预测的模式系数输入回归网络，同时估计与对准误差和模式失配相关的八个自由度参数。
AI.result: 模式分解阶段的平均绝对误差为0.0034，最终光束缺陷参数恢复的总平均绝对误差为0.0062，对应每个自由度的平均残余光学损耗为39 ppm（总计310 ppm）。该方法仅需标准CCD成像，对随机强度噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习流水线能够实现实时、高精度的波前传感和模式失配诊断，为提升精密光学系统的稳定性和灵敏度提供了可扩展且硬件高效的解决方案。

title: New Improved Schwarzschild Black Hole and Its Thermodynamics and Topological Classification
summary: We construct a renormalization-group improved Schwarzschild-like black hole geometry using the exact new scheme running for the Newton coupling. The scale identification is implemented via a standard interpolating proper-distance function that smoothly connects the ultraviolet and infrared regimes. We present the resulting coordinate-dependent coupling and the improved metric function, analyzing its asymptotic expansions. The large-distance limit is shown to recover the classical Schwarzschild solution, while the short-distance behavior exhibits a regular de Sitter-like core, demonstrating the regularization of the central singularity. We also analyze the thermodynamic properties of the solution, showing that quantum corrections significantly modify the small-radius behavior, leading to a remnant configuration and a nontrivial phase structure. Finally, we perform a topological classification of the thermodynamic phase space and demonstrate that asymptotically safe effects shift the critical point while preserving the global topological number of the Schwarzschild solution.

AI.tldr: 利用精确的新方案运行牛顿耦合构建重整化群改进的类史瓦西黑洞几何，通过标准插值适当距离函数连接紫外和红外区域，得到正则化的中心奇点并分析热力学性质。
AI.motivation: 研究量子引力效应对黑洞几何的影响，特别是如何通过重整化群改进来正则化史瓦西黑洞的中心奇点，并探索量子修正对黑洞热力学的改变。
AI.method: 使用精确的新方案运行牛顿耦合，通过标准插值适当距离函数实现尺度识别，构建重整化群改进的类史瓦西黑洞几何，分析其渐近行为和热力学性质。
AI.result: 大距离极限恢复经典史瓦西解，短距离行为呈现正则化的de Sitter-like核心，中心奇点被正则化。量子修正显著改变小半径行为，导致残余构型和非平凡相结构，渐近安全效应改变临界点但保持全局拓扑数。
AI.conclusion: 重整化群改进成功正则化黑洞中心奇点，量子引力效应显著改变黑洞热力学性质，渐近安全效应保持拓扑结构但改变相变临界点，为量子黑洞物理提供新见解。

title: Scientific performance of on-board analyses for the SVOM X-ray telescope MXT
summary: The Microchannel X-ray Telescope on board the Space-based multi-band astronomical Variable Objects Monitor (SVOM) satellite detects and localizes the X-ray afterglow of gamma-ray bursts. One year after the launch, this paper presents the in-flight performance of the scientific analyses conducted by the on-board computer. After summarizing the analysis steps, the paper reviews the on-board results obtained with 15 gamma-ray burst afterglows detected by the telescope between October 2024 and August 2025. For all bursts, the localization uncertainty is estimated to be below 2 arcmin, as required by the mission design. On average, the measured position is found to be 40 arcsec away from the position measured by other experiments with a better sky resolution. Moreover, we show that the on-board analysis provides a precise sky location for the burst only a few seconds after the beginning of the observation. Taking advantage of an efficient very-high-frequency antenna network, this information is quickly collected on the ground and disseminated to other observation facilities. This low-latency strategy is critical for the multi-wavelength and multi-instrument follow-up program of SVOM.

AI.tldr: SVOM卫星上的微通道X射线望远镜在轨一年后，展示了其机载计算机对伽马射线暴X射线余辉的实时分析和定位性能，定位精度优于2角分，平均误差40角秒，可在观测开始后几秒内提供精确位置信息。
AI.motivation: 评估SVOM卫星上微通道X射线望远镜机载计算机在轨一年的实际性能，验证其能否满足伽马射线暴快速定位和低延迟地面传输的任务要求，以支持多波段、多仪器的后续观测计划。
AI.method: 通过分析2024年10月至2025年8月期间望远镜检测到的15个伽马射线暴余辉数据，评估机载计算机的实时分析流程，包括定位精度、响应时间等关键性能指标，并与更高分辨率的地面实验测量结果进行对比。
AI.result: 所有伽马射线暴的定位不确定度均低于2角分，满足任务设计要求；平均定位误差为40角秒；机载分析可在观测开始后几秒内提供精确天空位置；通过高效甚高频天线网络实现快速地面收集和分发。
AI.conclusion: 微通道X射线望远镜的机载分析系统性能优异，能够实现伽马射线暴的快速精确定位和低延迟数据传输，为SVOM的多波段后续观测计划提供了关键技术支持，验证了任务设计的有效性。

title: Accretion Disk Perturbations and Their Effects on Kerr Black Hole Superradiance and Gravitational Atom Evolution
summary: Kerr black hole (BH) superradiance can form gravitational atoms and produce characteristic gravitational-wave signals, providing a probe of ultralight bosons and dark matter. In realistic systems, accretion-disk gravity can shift energy levels and mix states, modifying the effective superradiant growth. We model the disk as a weak external perturbation via a multipole expansion and derive an effective three-level Hamiltonian for the $n=2$ subspace $\{\ket{211},\ket{210},\ket{21-1}\}$ in the weak-coupling regime. The leading disk effect is the quadrupolar ($\ell_d=2$) tidal field, whose symmetries fix the selection rules: axisymmetry gives only diagonal shifts, equatorial nonaxisymmetry activates $Δm=\pm2$ mixing ($\ket{211}\leftrightarrow\ket{21-1}$), and breaking equatorial reflection opens $Δm=\pm1$ couplings involving $\ket{210}$. As illustrations, a transient equatorial $m=2$ spiral wave drives the resulting two-level system and can suppress or quench superradiance by populating a decaying mode, while a quasi-static warp produces full three-level mixing and can generate narrow ``growth gaps'' near accidental near-degeneracies, with the same static reshuffling also allowing enhancement when weight shifts toward the growing mode. These findings demonstrate that accretion disk perturbations are a crucial environmental factor in determining the dynamics of BH superradiance and the evolution of boson clouds, thereby providing a more reliable theoretical basis for assessing the detectability of ultralight bosons in realistic astrophysical settings.

AI.tldr: 研究吸积盘引力如何影响Kerr黑洞超辐射，通过多极展开建模，发现吸积盘扰动会改变能级、混合态，从而抑制或增强超辐射增长，为探测超轻玻色子提供更可靠的理论基础。
AI.motivation: 在现实系统中，吸积盘引力会改变黑洞超辐射形成的引力原子能级和混合态，从而影响超辐射增长的有效性。为了更准确地评估超轻玻色子在真实天体物理环境中的可探测性，需要研究吸积盘扰动对黑洞超辐射动力学的影响。
AI.method: 将吸积盘建模为弱外部扰动，通过多极展开推导出n=2子空间{∣211⟩,∣210⟩,∣21-1⟩}的有效三能级哈密顿量。主要考虑四极矩（ℓ_d=2）潮汐场，根据对称性确定选择规则：轴对称仅产生对角位移，赤道非轴对称激活Δm=±2混合，打破赤道反射对称则开启Δm=±1耦合。
AI.result: 瞬态赤道m=2螺旋波驱动两能级系统，可通过填充衰变模式抑制或淬灭超辐射；准静态翘曲产生完整三能级混合，在接近简并处产生窄"增长间隙"，静态重排也可通过权重向增长模式转移来增强超辐射。吸积盘扰动是决定黑洞超辐射动力学和玻色子云演化的关键环境因素。
AI.conclusion: 吸积盘扰动显著影响黑洞超辐射动力学，可能抑制或增强超辐射增长，这为在真实天体物理环境中评估超轻玻色子探测提供了更可靠的理论基础，表明环境因素在超辐射演化中起关键作用。

title: Can Light Cross a Singularity? Exact Solutions from Analogue Gravity
comment: Proceedings contribution for the 2nd Workshop on Matter, Astrophysics, Gravitation, Ions and Cosmology (MAGIC 2025), held at the Argentine Scientific Society (Sociedad Científica Argentina), September 1-4, 2025. 7 pages, 6 figures
summary: Using a simple spacetime hosting a strong curvature naked singularity, we employ an analogue gravity model to study electromagnetic fields in this background. We find exact solutions to the full set of electrostatic and electrodynamic equations that remain regular even in the presence of the singularity. Moreover, certain solutions sustain a regular and bounded power flux across the singularity, suggesting that electromagnetic energy may be transmitted through it.

AI.tldr: 研究使用模拟引力模型分析强曲率裸奇点时空中的电磁场，发现即使在奇点存在下仍存在正则解，且某些解能维持通过奇点的有界功率通量。
AI.motivation: 探索在包含强曲率裸奇点的时空中电磁场的行为，特别是研究电磁场能否在奇点附近保持正则性以及能量能否通过奇点传输。
AI.method: 使用模拟引力模型，在具有强曲率裸奇点的简单时空中求解完整的静电和电动力学方程组。
AI.result: 找到了即使在奇点存在下仍保持正则的精确解，某些解能够维持通过奇点的正则且有界的功率通量，表明电磁能量可能通过奇点传输。
AI.conclusion: 在强曲率裸奇点时空中，电磁场可以存在正则解，并且电磁能量有可能通过奇点传输，这对理解奇点处的物理行为具有重要意义。
